zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

title: PRD/transcript-derived atoms must carry verbatim source excerpts and line citations; subagent dispatched as read-only type for write-required tasks is itself a process bug
standalone_record_authored_on: 2026-05-03 (per Final Hawkeye F-FN-06 P3 — standalone file would be cleaner than embedded-in-incident-record)
captured_by: claude-orchestrator while running RUN-WEALTHCOM-001 Stage-0 PRD atomization

evidence.incident: INC-001 (2026-04-25): a subagent dispatched as `Explore` type (read-only) for a task that required file authoring (PRD atomization) returned synthesis-in-message rather than file artifacts. The synthesis contained fabricated specifics: investor names ('Bessemer Venture Partners', 'OpenAI Ventures', 'Homebrew', 'Point72') that DO NOT appear in the source PRD; document count '1.2 million' that conflicts with the PRD's actual 50k+/100k/800k+; Series B amount '$66M' that conflicts with the actual $65M; conflated 'PRD says X about wealth.com' with 'wealth.com is X' without confidence:medium tagging.
evidence.naive_outcome_avoided: If orchestrator had accepted the subagent's synthesis at face value, the fabricated investors and inflated metrics would have flowed into requirements (Stage-1 intake) → architecture (Stage-4 ADRs) → product code as live assumptions. Detection would have happened at Hawkeye stage exit at the earliest, possibly later — by which time the run's audit trail would already be compromised.

root_cause: Subagent dispatched as `Explore` type, which is read-only by design (intended for research). Cannot write files; returns synthesis-in-message instead.
Extraction prompt did not require grep-verifiable provenance per atom (no `source_excerpt` field, no `line_start`/`line_end`).
Source PRD is 549KB — likely exceeded the subagent's effective context window, causing it to confabulate plausible specifics for content it could not retain.

skill_system_changes_applied_via_PR_1_me.change: Added 3 anti-slop rejection triggers: (1) PRD/transcript atoms without verbatim source_excerpt + line citations; (2) Subagent dispatched as read-only type for write-required task; (3) Atoms conflating 'source says X about product' with 'product is X' without confidence:medium tagging.
New Subagent Dispatch Rules section with task-semantic → agent-type matrix; explicit triggers for INC-001 read-only pattern and INC-002 stall pattern.

Canonical 5-step protocol: required atom schema (id/kind/statement/source_file/line_start/line_end/source_excerpt/confidence/open_question), orchestrator workflow (subagent self-grep → orchestrator independent grep → Hawkeye sample audit), required reject triggers.

Concrete validator: field presence + line range bounds + random-sample source_excerpt grep verification. Exits non-zero on any failure. Self-tested against the corrective re-extraction (RUN-WEALTHCOM-001 TB-WC-2026-0425-002): 20-sample grep verified PASS.

regression_check: Future PRD-atom or transcript-atom extraction beads MUST: (1) dispatch a write-capable subagent type (`general-purpose`, not `Explore`), (2) require atoms with verbatim source_excerpt + line_start/line_end, (3) have the subagent run a self-grep on ≥10 random samples and report results, (4) have the orchestrator run an independent-grep on ≥5 fresh samples before accepting the output. The validate_prd_atoms.py script automates step 4. The Final Hawkeye independent audit's adversarial test 1 ('Promise vs evidence on transfer test acceptance') extends this to subagent-produced acceptance records.
broader_principle: Subagent type must match task semantics. Read-only subagents are for research; write-capable subagents are for artifacts. Mismatching them produces synthesis-in-message that cannot be promoted to evidence — slop with extra steps. The fix is at dispatch time, not at acceptance time: choose the right agent type and require provenance at the prompt level.

trace.follow_up_lessons: L-002 + L-003 (transfer-test-derived; lesson-L-002 + lesson-L-003 standalone records authored separately; both addressed via PR #2 lessons/L-002-L-003)
